TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Aw-s-lu / Oslo "No-wi a kamju Oslo pangiha " listen", 1624 a mihcaan-1925 a mihcaan mapangangan tu Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya "Kristiania", nu No-wi angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy, hamin cen-ce, kezay, lalangawan a kitizaan, nu No-wi a papacakayan, gingku kusi atu angangan nu miculu'ay a pahikukian, tini i No-wi sawali nutimulan nu Aw-s-lu labu a sangangiw nu diheb, tademaw 666,759 ku tademaw "katukuh 2017 amihca 1 a bulad 1 a demiad". pasu capiay 10 a zinazu' i labu nu kitizaay tademaw 975,744 ku tademaw "katukuh 2016 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 1 a dimiad", hamin nu tabakiay a Aw-s-lu a kitizaan u tademaw 1,546,706. Aw-s-lu zayhan micidek ku pigingkiw tu hekal atu migingkiw tu lala' a singangan. mataliyuk nu buyubuyuan atu umaumahan, yadah a lamangan ku mulangaway mauzip itiza. Aw-s-lu a niyazu' labu tulu a hun tu tus ku hekal u kilakilangan tu nanum ku liwliw, tatenga'ay ka cacelcel nu tademaw katukuh tu 5,221.6 ku tademaw/ katelek kung-li. tukuay balucu' a kitizaan u wayway mahiza u cacay mapalumaay macebed ku adidi'ay a buyu' ju mataliyukay a siuy, yadah ku sa'wac makay adidi'ay a buyu' musisil tahkal, micaliway tu kitizaan micumud tu Aw-s-lu a sangangiw nu diheb. i Wi-cin a ziday Aw-s-lu a kitizaan nu Tan-may saamisan a kuwan zumaay a Wi-ken. i Wi-cin ziday tu zikuz a ziday kung-yen 1040 a mihcaan Aw-s-lu atu An-s-lu "√Ānslo" i ngangan a patizeng. Aw-s-lu malakiay tu a kitizaan nu saamisan a Ow caay tu Wi-s-pi dada' satabakiay a cung-se-ci a tukuay, saaca katukuh ayza masakapah tu masinga'. (√Ānslo) . Aw-s-lu i 1048 a mihcaan pakala tu kasaupu nu niyazu' "kaupstad" a ngangan. 1070 a mihcaan, Aw-s-lu mapacakat mala cu-cyaw a sakuwan nu kitizaan. pakala i 1300 a mihcaan, No-wi hungti Ha-kang u-se Aw-s-lu mapala No-wi angangan nu tukay. No-wi makay 1397 a mihcaan katukuh 1523 a mihcaan atu 1536 katukuh 1814 a mihcaan atu Tan-may, atu 1814 a mihcaan katukuh 1905 a mihcaan atu Loy-tyen patizeng tu kung-cu-pang-lyenan, kanahatu Ke-pen-ha-ken atu S-te-ke-al-mu kilul mala kanatalay nu mikawaway nu masakaputay a kitizaan, Aw-s-lu mahiza tu aizaw ku zumaay kasasuma a angangan nu tukay. (kaupstad)ÁöĄŚúįšĹć.1070ŚĻī, . Aw-s-lu nu 14 seciay a No-wi malilid nu libung u pihacengay nu kakitizaan, i 15 atu 16 se-ci u tademaw atu keyzay talaayaw maselep. 1624 a mihcaan, Aw-s-lu namatuduh nu tabakiay a lamal mapeleng satu, zikuz, I Tan-may a hungti ci Ke-li-s-ti-an sepat se-ci pikuwanan, tukayay a kitizaan mabulaw tayza I baluhay a tukay micapi tu A-ke-s-bu-s a luma' patizeng, nu hungti a ngangan u Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya "Christiania" han. . 1838 a mihca 1 a bulad 1 a demiad, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya mala tu cacayay a niyazu'. i 1814 katukuh 1905 a mkihcaan Luy-tyen atu No-wi kalakaputan a ziday, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya micukaymas tu nu No-wi a tukay. kanahatu Iiayaw nu 19 se-ci, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya i Ow-cu labu nu liwliw uyza cacay adidi'ay a tukuy, nika makay sakatusa a kusi tu kunikalaalaw zikuz, uyni a tukay malingatu kalamkam sa malahad. i1900 a mihcaan tu kakilul, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya mala macakataytu a angangan a kusi, iza macapi tu 25 emang ku muenengay nu tacdemaw, 1925 a mihcaan, ungangan niza makay Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya sumadan tu Aw-s-lu. Śú®1900ŚĻīŚČćŚĺĆ, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == aw-s-r~…ĺu / osr~…ĺo "no-wi a kamju osr~…ĺo paŇčińßa " r~…ĺist…ôn", **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan mapaŇčaŇčan tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja "kristiania", nu no-wi aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukuj, ńßamin ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kitizaan, nu no-wi a papa ¶akajan, giŇčku kusi atu aŇčaŇčan nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a pańßikukian, tini i no-wi sawar~…ĺi nutimur~…ĺan nu aw-s-r~…ĺu r~…ĺabu a saŇčaŇčiw nu dińß…ôb, tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "katukuńß **** amińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad". pasu ¶apiaj ** a zinazu Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu nu kitizaaj tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a dimiad", ńßamin nu tabakiaj a aw-s-r~…ĺu a kitizaan u tad…ômaw *,***,***. aw-s-r~…ĺu zajńßan mi ¶id…ôk ku pigiŇčkiw tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu migiŇčkiw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a siŇčaŇčan. matar~…ĺijuk nu bujubujuan atu umaumańßan, jadańß a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj mauzip itiza. aw-s-r~…ĺu a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺabu tur~…ĺu a ńßun tu tus ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tu nanum ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj ka ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw katukuńß tu *,***.* ku tad…ômaw/ kat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk kuŇč-r~…ĺi. tukuaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a kitizaan u wajwaj mańßiza u ¶a ¶aj mapar~…ĺumaaj ma ¶…ôb…ôd ku adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ ° ju matar~…ĺijukaj a siuj, jadańß ku sa Ē~ °wa ¶ makaj adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ ° musisir~…ĺ tańßkar~…ĺ, mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kitizaan mi ¶umud tu aw-s-r~…ĺu a saŇčaŇčiw nu dińß…ôb. i wi- ¶in a zidaj aw-s-r~…ĺu a kitizaan nu tan-maj saamisan a kuwan zumaaj a wi-k…ôn. i wi- ¶in zidaj tu zikuz a zidaj kuŇč-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan aw-s-r~…ĺu atu an-s-r~…ĺu "*nsr~…ĺo" i ŇčaŇčan a patiz…ôŇč. aw-s-r~…ĺu mar~…ĺakiaj tu a kitizaan nu saamisan a ow ¶aaj tu wi-s-pi dada Ē~ ° satabakiaj a ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a tukuaj, saa ¶a katukuńß ajza masakapańß tu masiŇča Ē~ °. (*nsr~…ĺo) . aw-s-r~…ĺu i **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu kasaupu nu nijazu Ē~ ° "kaupstad" a ŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan, aw-s-r~…ĺu mapa ¶akat mar~…ĺa ¶u- ¶jaw a sakuwan nu kitizaan. pakar~…ĺa i **** a mińß ¶aan, no-wi ńßuŇčti ńßa-kaŇč u-s…ô aw-s-r~…ĺu mapar~…ĺa no-wi aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. no-wi makaj **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu **** katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu tan-maj, atu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn patiz…ôŇč tu kuŇč- ¶u-paŇč-r~…ĺj…ônan, kanańßatu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn atu s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺaj nu mikawawaj nu masakaputaj a kitizaan, aw-s-r~…ĺu mańßiza tu aizaw ku zumaaj kasasuma a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. (kaupstad)***.*****, . aw-s-r~…ĺu nu ** s…ô ¶iaj a no-wi mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu r~…ĺibuŇč u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu kakitizaan, i ** atu ** s…ô- ¶i u tad…ômaw atu k…ôzaj tar~…ĺaajaw mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp. **** a mińß ¶aan, aw-s-r~…ĺu namatuduńß nu tabakiaj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ map…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč satu, zikuz, i tan-maj a ńßuŇčti ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an s…ôpat s…ô- ¶i pikuwanan, tukajaj a kitizaan mabur~…ĺaw tajza i bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj mi ¶api tu a-k…ô-s-bu-s a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč, nu ńßuŇčti a ŇčaŇčan u k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja " ¶ńßristiania" ńßan. . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja mar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶ajaj a nijazu Ē~ °. i **** katukuńß **** a mkińß ¶aan r~…ĺuj-tj…ôn atu no-wi kar~…ĺakaputan a zidaj, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja mi ¶ukajmas tu nu no-wi a tukaj. kanańßatu iiajaw nu ** s…ô- ¶i, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja i ow- ¶u r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw ujza ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a tukuj, nika makaj sakatusa a kusi tu kunikar~…ĺaar~…ĺaw zikuz, ujni a tukaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu kar~…ĺamkam sa mar~…ĺańßad. i**** a mińß ¶aan tu kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja mar~…ĺa ma ¶akatajtu a aŇčaŇčan a kusi, iza ma ¶api tu ** …ômaŇč ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu ta ¶d…ômaw, **** a mińß ¶aan, uŇčaŇčan niza makaj k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja sumadan tu aw-s-r~…ĺu. ********, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Aw-s-lu / Oslo "No-wi a kamju Oslo pangiha " listen", 1624 a mihcaan-1925 a mihcaan mapangangan tu Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya "Kristiania", nu No-wi angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy, hamin cen-ce, kezay, lalangawan a kitizaan, nu No-wi a papacakayan, gingku kusi atu angangan nu miculu'ay a pahikukian, tini i No-wi sawali nutimulan nu Aw-s-lu labu a sangangiw nu diheb, tademaw 666,759 ku tademaw "katukuh 2017 amihca 1 a bulad 1 a demiad". pasu capiay 10 a zinazu' i labu nu kitizaay tademaw 975,744 ku tademaw "katukuh 2016 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 1 a dimiad", hamin nu tabakiay a Aw-s-lu a kitizaan u tademaw 1,546,706. Aw-s-lu zayhan micidek ku pigingkiw tu hekal atu migingkiw tu lala' a singangan. mataliyuk nu buyubuyuan atu umaumahan, yadah a lamangan ku mulangaway mauzip itiza. Aw-s-lu a niyazu' labu tulu a hun tu tus ku hekal u kilakilangan tu nanum ku liwliw, tatenga'ay ka cacelcel nu tademaw katukuh tu 5,221.6 ku tademaw/ katelek kung-li. tukuay balucu' a kitizaan u wayway mahiza u cacay mapalumaay macebed ku adidi'ay a buyu' ju mataliyukay a siuy, yadah ku sa'wac makay adidi'ay a buyu' musisil tahkal, micaliway tu kitizaan micumud tu Aw-s-lu a sangangiw nu diheb. i Wi-cin a ziday Aw-s-lu a kitizaan nu Tan-may saamisan a kuwan zumaay a Wi-ken. i Wi-cin ziday tu zikuz a ziday kung-yen 1040 a mihcaan Aw-s-lu atu An-s-lu "√Ānslo" i ngangan a patizeng. Aw-s-lu malakiay tu a kitizaan nu saamisan a Ow caay tu Wi-s-pi dada' satabakiay a cung-se-ci a tukuay, saaca katukuh ayza masakapah tu masinga'. (√Ānslo) . Aw-s-lu i 1048 a mihcaan pakala tu kasaupu nu niyazu' "kaupstad" a ngangan. 1070 a mihcaan, Aw-s-lu mapacakat mala cu-cyaw a sakuwan nu kitizaan. pakala i 1300 a mihcaan, No-wi hungti Ha-kang u-se Aw-s-lu mapala No-wi angangan nu tukay. No-wi makay 1397 a mihcaan katukuh 1523 a mihcaan atu 1536 katukuh 1814 a mihcaan atu Tan-may, atu 1814 a mihcaan katukuh 1905 a mihcaan atu Loy-tyen patizeng tu kung-cu-pang-lyenan, kanahatu Ke-pen-ha-ken atu S-te-ke-al-mu kilul mala kanatalay nu mikawaway nu masakaputay a kitizaan, Aw-s-lu mahiza tu aizaw ku zumaay kasasuma a angangan nu tukay. (kaupstad)ÁöĄŚúįšĹć.1070ŚĻī, . Aw-s-lu nu 14 seciay a No-wi malilid nu libung u pihacengay nu kakitizaan, i 15 atu 16 se-ci u tademaw atu keyzay talaayaw maselep. 1624 a mihcaan, Aw-s-lu namatuduh nu tabakiay a lamal mapeleng satu, zikuz, I Tan-may a hungti ci Ke-li-s-ti-an sepat se-ci pikuwanan, tukayay a kitizaan mabulaw tayza I baluhay a tukay micapi tu A-ke-s-bu-s a luma' patizeng, nu hungti a ngangan u Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya "Christiania" han. . 1838 a mihca 1 a bulad 1 a demiad, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya mala tu cacayay a niyazu'. i 1814 katukuh 1905 a mkihcaan Luy-tyen atu No-wi kalakaputan a ziday, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya micukaymas tu nu No-wi a tukay. kanahatu Iiayaw nu 19 se-ci, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya i Ow-cu labu nu liwliw uyza cacay adidi'ay a tukuy, nika makay sakatusa a kusi tu kunikalaalaw zikuz, uyni a tukay malingatu kalamkam sa malahad. i1900 a mihcaan tu kakilul, Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya mala macakataytu a angangan a kusi, iza macapi tu 25 emang ku muenengay nu tacdemaw, 1925 a mihcaan, ungangan niza makay Ke-li-s-ti-an-ni-ya sumadan tu Aw-s-lu. Śú®1900ŚĻīŚČćŚĺĆ, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == aw-s-r~…ĺu / osr~…ĺo "no-wi a kamju osr~…ĺo paŇčińßa " r~…ĺist…ôn", **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan mapaŇčaŇčan tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja "kristiania", nu no-wi aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukuj, ńßamin ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kitizaan, nu no-wi a papa ¶akajan, giŇčku kusi atu aŇčaŇčan nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a pańßikukian, tini i no-wi sawar~…ĺi nutimur~…ĺan nu aw-s-r~…ĺu r~…ĺabu a saŇčaŇčiw nu dińß…ôb, tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "katukuńß **** amińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad". pasu ¶apiaj ** a zinazu Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu nu kitizaaj tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a dimiad", ńßamin nu tabakiaj a aw-s-r~…ĺu a kitizaan u tad…ômaw *,***,***. aw-s-r~…ĺu zajńßan mi ¶id…ôk ku pigiŇčkiw tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu migiŇčkiw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a siŇčaŇčan. matar~…ĺijuk nu bujubujuan atu umaumańßan, jadańß a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj mauzip itiza. aw-s-r~…ĺu a nijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺabu tur~…ĺu a ńßun tu tus ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tu nanum ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj ka ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw katukuńß tu *,***.* ku tad…ômaw/ kat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk kuŇč-r~…ĺi. tukuaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a kitizaan u wajwaj mańßiza u ¶a ¶aj mapar~…ĺumaaj ma ¶…ôb…ôd ku adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ ° ju matar~…ĺijukaj a siuj, jadańß ku sa Ē~ °wa ¶ makaj adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ ° musisir~…ĺ tańßkar~…ĺ, mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kitizaan mi ¶umud tu aw-s-r~…ĺu a saŇčaŇčiw nu dińß…ôb. i wi- ¶in a zidaj aw-s-r~…ĺu a kitizaan nu tan-maj saamisan a kuwan zumaaj a wi-k…ôn. i wi- ¶in zidaj tu zikuz a zidaj kuŇč-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan aw-s-r~…ĺu atu an-s-r~…ĺu "*nsr~…ĺo" i ŇčaŇčan a patiz…ôŇč. aw-s-r~…ĺu mar~…ĺakiaj tu a kitizaan nu saamisan a ow ¶aaj tu wi-s-pi dada Ē~ ° satabakiaj a ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a tukuaj, saa ¶a katukuńß ajza masakapańß tu masiŇča Ē~ °. (*nsr~…ĺo) . aw-s-r~…ĺu i **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu kasaupu nu nijazu Ē~ ° "kaupstad" a ŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan, aw-s-r~…ĺu mapa ¶akat mar~…ĺa ¶u- ¶jaw a sakuwan nu kitizaan. pakar~…ĺa i **** a mińß ¶aan, no-wi ńßuŇčti ńßa-kaŇč u-s…ô aw-s-r~…ĺu mapar~…ĺa no-wi aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. no-wi makaj **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu **** katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu tan-maj, atu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu r~…ĺoj-tj…ôn patiz…ôŇč tu kuŇč- ¶u-paŇč-r~…ĺj…ônan, kanańßatu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn atu s-t…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ-mu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺaj nu mikawawaj nu masakaputaj a kitizaan, aw-s-r~…ĺu mańßiza tu aizaw ku zumaaj kasasuma a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. (kaupstad)***.*****, . aw-s-r~…ĺu nu ** s…ô ¶iaj a no-wi mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu r~…ĺibuŇč u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu kakitizaan, i ** atu ** s…ô- ¶i u tad…ômaw atu k…ôzaj tar~…ĺaajaw mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp. **** a mińß ¶aan, aw-s-r~…ĺu namatuduńß nu tabakiaj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ map…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč satu, zikuz, i tan-maj a ńßuŇčti ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an s…ôpat s…ô- ¶i pikuwanan, tukajaj a kitizaan mabur~…ĺaw tajza i bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj mi ¶api tu a-k…ô-s-bu-s a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč, nu ńßuŇčti a ŇčaŇčan u k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja " ¶ńßristiania" ńßan. . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja mar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶ajaj a nijazu Ē~ °. i **** katukuńß **** a mkińß ¶aan r~…ĺuj-tj…ôn atu no-wi kar~…ĺakaputan a zidaj, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja mi ¶ukajmas tu nu no-wi a tukaj. kanańßatu iiajaw nu ** s…ô- ¶i, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja i ow- ¶u r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw ujza ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a tukuj, nika makaj sakatusa a kusi tu kunikar~…ĺaar~…ĺaw zikuz, ujni a tukaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu kar~…ĺamkam sa mar~…ĺańßad. i**** a mińß ¶aan tu kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja mar~…ĺa ma ¶akatajtu a aŇčaŇčan a kusi, iza ma ¶api tu ** …ômaŇč ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu ta ¶d…ômaw, **** a mińß ¶aan, uŇčaŇčan niza makaj k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-ti-an-ni-ja sumadan tu aw-s-r~…ĺu. ********, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj natin…ôŇčan
